steps.t: The Grimwood Lumber-yard lay near the centre of Hithlad. Sergeant-at-Arms Hafthor asked you to find and defeat the troll-tyrant Gundzor at the Grimwoo…
Sergeant-at-Arms Hafthor awaits news of your victory over the Tyrant Gundzor at Glân Vraig. You met the Tyrant Gundzor within the lumber-yard and defe…
